Class ProgramVariableCollection

java.lang.Object
de.uka.ilkd.key.speclang.jml.translation.ProgramVariableCollection
public class ProgramVariableCollection extends Object
A collection of all program variables needed to translate a textual JML specification case. Used in JMLSpecFactory.

  • Field Summary

    Fields
    Modifier and Type
    Field
    Description
    Map<LocationVariable, JTerm>
    atBefores
    A map from every variable var to \before(var) (if applicable).
    Map<LocationVariable, LocationVariable>

    A map from every variable var to \before(var) (if applicable).

    A map from every variable var to \old(var).

    A map from every variable var to \old(var).

    • ProgramVariableCollection

      public ProgramVariableCollection(LocationVariable selfVar, ImmutableList<LocationVariable> paramVars, LocationVariable resultVar, LocationVariable excVar, Map<LocationVariable, LocationVariable> atPreVars, Map<LocationVariable, JTerm> atPres)
      Create a collection containing the specified variables.
      Parameters:
      selfVar - self
      paramVars - the list of method parameters if the textual specification case is a method contract.
      resultVar - result
      excVar - exception
      atPreVars - a map from every variable var to \old(var).
      atPres - a map from every variable var to \old(var).
